Architecture Map

Complete system topology and interaction patterns

Technical Spec
End-to-End System Flow
1

User Initiates Action

Dashboard

User clicks button in Dashboard (Next.js 15 on Vercel)

2

API Receives Request

API

NestJS API validates auth, processes business logic

3

State Persisted

Supabase + Redis

Data stored in Supabase PostgreSQL, job queued in Redis

4

Orchestrator Provisions

Orchestrator

VPS created on Hetzner, Docker installed, Worker deployed

5

Worker Executes

Worker

Pulls job from queue, loads config, calls OpenClaw for plan

6

AI Planning

OpenClaw

OpenClaw generates execution plan, returns structured JSON

7

External API Calls

External APIs

Worker executes Shopify, Meta, AutoDS API calls

8

Progress Reported

Feedback Loop

Logs and state written to Supabase, Dashboard updates realtime

API Endpoints
POST/api/v1/projectsCreate new project
GET/api/v1/projects/:idGet project details
POST/api/v1/projects/:id/launchLaunch AI workspace
GET/api/v1/workers/:id/statusGet worker status
POST/api/v1/jobsCreate job
GET/api/v1/jobs/:idGet job status
POST/api/v1/billing/subscribeCreate subscription
POST/api/v1/webhooks/stripeStripe webhook
Database Schema
usersAuthentication & profiles
projectsProject configuration
storesShopify store details
workersWorker instances
jobsJob queue state
logsExecution logs
api_keysEncrypted credentials
subscriptionsBilling records
meta_campaignsAd campaigns
autods_productsProduct inventory
Deployment Architecture

Vercel

Dashboard Hosting

Edge Network, Auto-deploy

Docker

API & Orchestrator

Containerized Services

Hetzner VPS

Worker Instances

Isolated per Project
